steps.title: Find the shared trait
steps.content: The student wants a similarity between Reed's and Hayes's inventions. The notes say Reed's automatic coupler improved on existing train car couplers and Hayes's mobile refrigeration system improved on existing food transport trucks.

steps.title: Choose the similarity sentence
steps.content: B discusses only Reed. D discusses only Hayes. C contrasts what each invention made possible, so it does not emphasize a similarity. The sentence that names both inventions and says both improved existing designs matches the goal. The answer is A.
